---
title: "Products"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <p class="page-intro">
    Projects and products I've built, shipped, or contributed to.
  </p>

  <div class="products-grid">

    <!-- ============================================================
         PRODUCT CARD — copy this block for each product
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-image-wrap">
        <img src="assets/product1.png" alt="Product Name"
             onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/400x220/1a237e/ffffff?text=Product'">
      </div>
      <div class="product-body">
        <div class="product-status live">Live</div>  <!-- Options: live | wip | archived -->
        <h3 class="product-title">[Product Name]</h3>
        <p class="product-desc">
          [1–3 sentence description of what the product does, the problem it solves, and who it's for.]
        </p>
        <div class="product-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Tech/Tool 1]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Tech/Tool 2]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Tech/Tool 3]</span>
        </div>
        <div class="product-links">
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Visit</a>
          <a href="https://github.com/moboroumand" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Repo</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ============================================================
         PRODUCT CARD 2
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="product-image-wrap">
        <img src="assets/product2.png" alt="Product Name"
             onerror="this.src='https://via.placeholder.com/400x220/4a148c/ffffff?text=Product'">
      </div>
      <div class="product-body">
        <div class="product-status wip">In Progress</div>
        <h3 class="product-title">[Product Name]</h3>
        <p class="product-desc">
          [Description of the second product.]
        </p>
        <div class="product-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Tech/Tool 1]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Tech/Tool 2]</span>
        </div>
        <div class="product-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/moboroumand" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> Repo</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Add more product-card blocks as needed -->

  </div>
</div>
```
